items.title: FWIW it’s fairly impossible to try to project what the Hawks do at 57.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
FWIW it’s fairly impossible to try to project what the Hawks do at 57.

When you get that deep in R2, some agents are begging teams NOT to take their guys so they can be priority free agents.

Do the Hawks want to roster a third rookie?

Stash candidates?

Anyway, it’s wide open.
